title: PMS Grinch Baubles 75mm Pack of 6 – Official Licensed Christmas Tree Baubles – Assorted Shiny Finish Designs Featuring The Grinch – Fun Festive Seasonal
features: PACK OF 6 – Includes six 75 mm baubles, each featuring colourful licensed Grinch-themed designs
OFFICIAL GRINCH BAUBLES – Licensed set inspired by Dr. Seuss’s The Grinch, instantly recognisable and full of character
SHINY FINISH – Glossy surface adds sparkle and catches the light beautifully on any Christmas tree
LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE – Made from polyfoam for easy hanging, safe for families with children
FESTIVE BAUBLE SET – Ideal for Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, or creative seasonal displays
description: Bring a touch of mischievous fun to your tree with the PMS Grinch Baubles, a licensed pack of 6 festive decorations. Each bauble measures 75 mm and showcases colourful designs inspired by Dr. Seuss’s The Grinch, making them instantly recognisable to fans of the classic character. Finished with a shiny surface, these baubles reflect light beautifully and add a cheerful sparkle to your Christmas display. Crafted from lightweight yet durable polyfoam, these baubles are easy to hang and safe for families with children. Their assorted designs allow you to create a varied and eye-catching look across your Christmas tree, wreaths, or garlands. Whether you’re creating a themed Grinch tree or simply adding a playful twist to your seasonal décor, this set provides the perfect finishing touch. Reusable year after year, the PMS Grinch Baubles make decorating for Christmas even more enjoyable. A must-have for families, collectors, and fans of The Grinch, these baubles are sure to raise smiles and add festive fun to any setting.
